query: SELECT a.id, a.extensivOrderId, a.facilityId as fid_1, b.facilityId as fid_2, b.facilityName as name_2 FROM order_tracking a LEFT JOIN order_tracking b ON a.extensivOrderId = b.extensivOrderId AND a.configId = b.configId AND b.facilityId = 2 WHERE a.facilityId = 1 AND a.facilityName = 'COL-Columbus';
